arts.ttl: The best bits from Palace's Christmas-time training
arts.sum: Christmas Day may be here – but the hard work rarely stops for Crystal Palace, who are fully in pursuit of three points away to Bournemouth on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Manager wants Bournemouth player ‘at all costs’ – President willing to table offer for Cherries star
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen was on target for Bournemouth against Manchester United at the weekend. It was his second goal for the club, as the defender also found the back of the net against Tottenham. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace star wants to ‘study offers calmly’ before making decision – Eagles aware he could leave
arts.sum: Daniel Muñoz has been a regular for Crystal Palace since arriving at Selhurst Park from KRC Genk at the start of this year. The Colombia international made 35 appearances for the Eagles, managing two goals and six assists in the process, and 19 appearances are from this season. arts.ttl: The Numbers behind Palace's best Boxing Day memories
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are back in action on Boxing Day - making the trip down to the south coast to face Bournemouth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Glasner compares first Palace Christmas with continental festivities
arts.sum: In the midst of a busy run of festive fixtures for Crystal Palace, manager Oliver Glasner has discussed his first Christmas and New Year in England - and his previous experiences from Austria and Germany.
From everybody at Crystal Palace Football Club: we wish you, and your loved ones, a very Merry Christmas!
